title: Genre Fluency Game
genericDescription: Demonstrate command of a known genre; identify genre conventions; add a focused twist.
specificDescription: Build a polished microgame in a recognized genre such as platformer, shmup, roguelike, tactics, puzzle, rhythm, management, visual novel, deckbuilder, or immersive sim. Include one twist that changes player priorities.
gradingRubric: 30 pts genre fluency; 20 pts twist integration; 20 pts playability; 15 pts polish; 15 pts notes.
